announcement.goal.civilian: Stay safe and survive till the end of the night.
announcement.goal.killer: Eliminate a guest to succeed, before time runs out.
announcement.goal.vigilante: Eliminate any murderers and protect the guests.
announcement.goals.civilian: Stay safe and survive till the end of the night.
announcement.goals.killer: Eliminate all guests before time runs out.
announcement.goals.vigilante: Eliminate any murderers and protect the guests.
announcement.loose_ends.premise: Everybody in the manor has a derringer and a knife.
announcement.premise: There is a killer in the manor.
announcement.premises: There are %s killers in the manor.
game.win.passengers: All killers were eliminated: the guests win!
game.win.time: The killers ran out of time: the guests win!
item.wathe.blackout.tooltip:
Turn off all lights in the manor for 15 to 30 seconds
Use your instinct [left-alt] to see your targets in the dark
Activated instantly on purchase, 5 minute cooldown
item.wathe.revolver.tooltip:
Point, right-click and shoot
Drops if you kill a guest
lobby.autostart.active: Game will start once 6+ guests are present
tip.letter.name: Dear %s, welcome to Duskwood Manor!
tip.letter.tooltip1: %s for your trip on the 15th of April 1912.
tip.letter.tooltip2: La Sirène wishes you a pleasant and safe stay.
credits.wathe.thank_you:
Thank you for playing The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express!
Me and my team spent a lot of time working
on this mod and we hope you enjoy it.
If you do and wish to make a video or stream
please make sure to credit my channel,
video and the mod page!
 - RAT / doctor4t
 
Thanks for playing on Duskwood Manor!
- somewhat_grand
